text: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away.
tl: Iqtaraba linnaasi hisaabuhum Wa-hum fee ghaflatim mu'ridoon

text: No mention [i.e., revelation] comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play
tl: Maa ya'teehim min zikrim mir Rabbihim muhdasin illas tama'oohu Wa-hum yal'aboon

text: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], \"Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]?\"
tl: Laahiyatan quloobuhum; Wa-asarrun najwal lazeena zalamoo hal haazaaa illaa basharum mislukum 'afa-ta'toonas sihra Wa-antum tubsiroon

text: He [the Prophet (ﷺ)] said, \"My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbee ya'lamul qawla fis samaaa'i wal-ardi Wa-Huwas Samee'ul 'Aleem

text: But they say, \"[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles].\"
tl: Bal qaalooo adghaasu ahlaamin bal iftaraahu bal huwa shaa'irun fal-ya'tinaa bi-Aayatin kamaa ursilal awwaloon

text: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe?
tl: Maaa aaamanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknaahaa a-fahum yu'minoon

text: And We sent not before you, [O Muḥammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.
tl: Wa-maaa arsalnaa qablaka illaa rijaalan nooheee ilaihim fas'aloo ahlaz zikri in kuntum laa ta'lamoon

text: And We did not make them [i.e., the prophets] forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].
tl: Wa-maa ja'alnaahum jasadal laa ya'kuloonat ta'aama Wa-maa kaanoo khaalideen

text: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors.
tl: Summa sadaqnaa-humul wa'da fa-anjainaahum Wa-man nashaaa'u Wa-ahlaknal musrifeen

text: We have certainly sent down to you a Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?
tl: Laqad anzalnaaa ilaikum Kitaaban feehi zikrukum afalaa ta'qiloon

text: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.
tl: Wa-kam qasamnaa min qaryatin kaanat zaalimatanw Wa-ansha'-naa ba'dahaa qawman aakhareen

text: And when they [i.e., its inhabitants] perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it.
tl: Falammaaa ahassoo ba'sanaaa izaa hum minhaa yarkudoon

text: [Some angels said], \"Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned.\"
tl: Laa tarkudoo warji'ooo ilaa maaa utriftum feehi Wa-masaakinikum la'allakum tus'aloon

text: They said, \"O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers.\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-wailanaaa innaa kunnaa zaalimeen

text: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].
tl: Famaa zaalat tilka da'waahum hattaa ja'alnaahum haseedan khaamideen

text: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.
tl: Wa-maa khalaqnas samaaa'a wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa laa'ibeen

text: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.
tl: Law aradnaaa an nattakhiza lahwal lat-takhaznaahu mil ladunnaaa in kunnaa faa'ileen

text: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe.
tl: Bal naqzifu bilhaqqi 'alal baatili fa-yadmaghuhoo fa-izaa huwa zaahiq; Wa-lakumul wailu mimmaa tasifoon

text: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him [i.e., the angels] are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.
tl: Wa-lahoo man fis samaawaati wal-ard; Wa-man 'indahoo laa yastakbiroona 'an 'ibaada-tihee Wa-laa yastahsiroon

text: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken.
tl: Yusabbihoona laila wannahaara laa yafturoon

text: Or have they [i.e., men] taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]?
tl: Amit takhazooo aalihatam minal ardi hum yunshiroon

text: Had there been within them [i.e., the heavens and earth] gods besides Allāh, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allāh, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
tl: Law kaana feehimaaa aalihatun illal laahu lafasadataa; fa-Subhaanal laahi Rabbil 'Arshi 'ammaa yasifoon

text: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.
tl: Laa yus'alu 'ammaa yaf'alu Wa-hum yus'aloon

text: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Produce your proof. This [Qur’ān] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me.\" But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.
tl: Amit takhazoo min doonihee aalihatan qul haatoo burhaanakum haaza zikru mam ma'iya Wa-zikru man qablee; bal aksaruhum laa ya'lamoonal haqqa fahum mu'ridoon

text: And We sent not before you any messenger except We revealed to him that, \"There is no deity except Me, so worship Me.\"
tl: Wa-maaa arsalnaa min qablika mir Rasoolin illaa nooheee ilaihi annahoo laaa ilaaha illaaa Ana fa'budoon

text: And they say, \"The Most Merciful has taken a son.\" Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.
tl: Wa-qaalut takhazar Rahmaanu waladaa; Subhaanahu bal 'ibaadum mukramoon

text: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.
tl: Laa yasbiqoonahoo bil-qawli Wa-hum bi-amrihee ya'maloon

text: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.
tl: Ya'lamu maa baina aideehim Wa-maa khalfahum Wa-laa yashfa'oona illaa limanir tadaa Wa-hum min khash-yatihee mushfiqoon

text: And whoever of them should say, \"Indeed, I am a god besides Him\" - that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.
tl: Wa-main yaqul minhum inneee ilaahum min doonihee fazaalika najzeehi Jahannam; kazaalika najziz zaalimeen

text: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and then We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe?
tl: Awalam yaral lazeena kafarooo annas samaawaati wal-arda kaanataa ratqan fafataqnaa-humaa Wa-ja'alnaa minal maaa'i kulla shai'in haiyin afalaa yu'minoon

text: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.
tl: Wa-ja'alnaa fil ardi rawaasiya an tameeda bihim Wa-ja'alnaa feehaa fijaajan subulal la'allahum yahtadoon

text: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away.
tl: Wa-ja'alnas samaaa'a saqfam mahfoozanw Wa-hum 'an Aayaatihaa mu'ridoon

text: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee khalaqal laila wannahaara washshamsa wal-qamara kullun fee falakiny yasbahoon

text: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?
tl: Wa-maa ja'alnaa libasharim min qablikal khuld; afa immitta fahumul khaalidoon

text: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.
tl: Kullu nafsin zaaa'iqatul mawt; Wa-nablookum bi-sharri walkhairi fitnatanw Wa-ilainaa turja'oon

text: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muḥammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], \"Is this the one who mentions [i.e., insults] your gods?\" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers.
tl: Wa-izaa ra-aakal lazeena kafarooo ien yattakhizoonaka illa huzuwan; ahaazal lazee yazkuru aalihatakum Wa-hum bi-zikrir Rahmaani hum kaafiroon

text: Man was created of haste [i.e., impatience]. I will show you My signs [i.e., vengeance], so do not impatiently urge Me.
tl: Khuliqal insaanu min 'ajal; sa-ureekum Aayaatee falaa tasta'jiloon

text: And they say, \"When is this promise, if you should be truthful?\"
tl: Wa-yaqooloona mataa haazal wa'du in kuntum saadiqeen

text: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided...
tl: Law ya'lamul lazeena kafaroo heena laa yakuffoona 'anw wujoohihimun Naara Wa-laa 'an zuhoorihim Wa-laa hum yunsaroon

text: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.
tl: Bal ta'teehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum falaa yastatee'oona raddahaa Wa-laa hum yunzaroon

text: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Wa-laqadis tuhzi'a bi-Rusulim min qablika fahaaqa billazeena sakhiroo minhum maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: Say, \"Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?\" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.
tl: Qul main yakla-'ukum billaili wannahaari minar Rahmaan; bal hum 'an zikri Rabbihim mu'ridoon

text: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.
tl: Am lahum aalihatun tamna'uhum min dooninaa; laa yastatee'oona nasra anfusihim Wa-laa hum minna yus-haboon

text: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? Is it they who will overcome?
tl: Bal matta'naa haaa'ulaaa'i Wa-aabaaa'ahum hattaa taala 'alaihimul 'umur; afalaa yarawna anna na'til arda nanqusuhaa min atraafihaa; afahumul ghaaliboon

text: Say, \"I only warn you by revelation.\" But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.
tl: Qul innamaaa unzirukum bilwahyi; Wa-laa yasma'us summud du'aaa-'a izaa maa yunzaroon

text: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, \"O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers.\"
tl: Wa-la'in massat-hum nafhatun min 'azaabi Rabbika la-yaqoolunna yaawailanaaa innnaa kunnaa zaalimeen

text: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant.
tl: Wa-nada'ul mawaazeenal qista li-Yawmil Qiyaamati falaa tuzlamu nafsun shai'aa; Wa-in kaana misqaala habbatim min khardalin atainaa bihaa; Wa-kafaa binaa haasibeen

text: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosa Wa-haaroonal Furqaana Wa-diyaa'anw Wa-zikral lilmuttaqeen

text: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive.
tl: Allazeena yakhshawna Rabbahum bilghaibi Wa-hum minas Saa'ati mushfiqoon

text: And this [Qur’ān] is a blessed message which We have sent down. Then are you with it unacquainted?
tl: Wa-haazaa Zikrum Mubaarakun anzalnaah; afa-antum lahoo munkiroon

text: And We had certainly given Abraham his sound judgement before, and We were of him well-Knowing
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaaa Ibraaheema rushdahoo min qablu Wa-kunnaa bihee 'aalimeen

text: When he said to his father and his people, \"What are these statues to which you are devoted?\"
tl: Iz qaala li-abeehi Wa-qawmihee maa haazihit tamaaseelul lateee antum lahaa 'aakifoon

text: They said, \"We found our fathers worshippers of them.\"
tl: Qaaloo wajadnaaa aabaaa'anaa lahaa 'aabideen

text: He said, \"You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error.\"
tl: Qaala laqad kuntum antum Wa-aabaaa'ukum fee dalaalin mubeen

text: They said, \"Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest?\"
tl: Qaalooo aji'tanaa bil-haqqi am anta minal laa'ibeen

text: He said, \"[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify.
tl: Qaala bar Rabbukum Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardil lazee fatarahunna Wa-ana 'alaa zaalikum minash shaahideen

text: And [I swear] by Allāh, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away.\"
tl: Wa-tallaahi la-akeedanna asnaamakum ba'da an tuwalloo mudbireen

text: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].
tl: Faja'alahum juzaazan illaa kabeeral lahum la'allahum ilaihi yarji'oon

text: They said, \"Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers.\"
tl: Qaaloo man fa'ala haazaa bi-aalihatinaaa innahoo laminaz zaalimeen

text: They said, \"We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham.\"
tl: Qaaloo sami'naa fatany yazkuruhum yuqaalu lahooo ibraaheem

text: They said, \"Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify.\"
tl: Qaaloo fa'too bihee 'alaaa a'yunin naasi la'allahum yash-hadoon

text: They said, \"Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?\"
tl: Qaalooo 'a-anta fa'alta haazaa bi-aalihatinaa yaaa-ibraaheem

text: He said, \"Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak.\"
tl: Qaala bal fa'alahoo kabeeruhum haazaa fas'aloohum in kaanoo yantiqoon

text: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], \"Indeed, you are the wrongdoers.\"
tl: Faraja'ooo ilaaa anfusihim faqaalooo innakum antumuz zaalimoon

text: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], \"You have already known that these do not speak!\"
tl: Summa nukisoo 'alaa ru'oosihim laqad 'alimta maa haaa'ulaaa'i yantiqoon

text: He said, \"Then do you worship instead of Allāh that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?
tl: Qaala afata'budoona min doonil laahi maa laa yanfa'ukum shai'anw Wa-laa yadurrukum

text: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allāh. Then will you not use reason?\"
tl: Uffil lakum Wa-limaa ta'budoona min doonil laah; afalaa ta'qiloon

text: They said, \"Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act.\"
tl: Qaaloo harriqoohu wansurooo aalihatakum in kuntum faa'ileen

text: We [i.e., Allāh] said, \"O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham.\"
tl: Qulnaa yaa-naaru koonee bardanw Wa-salaaman 'alaaa Ibraaheem

text: And they intended for him a plan [i.e., harm], but We made them the greatest losers.
tl: Wa-araadoo bihee kaidan faja'alnaahumul akhsareen

text: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds [i.e., peoples].
tl: Wa-najjainaahu Wa-Lootan ilal ardil latee baaraknaa feehaa lil-'aalameen

text: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous.
tl: Wa-wahabnaa lahooo Ishaaqa; Wa-Ya'qooba naafilah; Wa-kullan ja'alnaa saaliheen

text: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakāh; and they were worshippers of Us.
tl: Wa-ja'alnaahum a'immataien yahdoona bi-amrinaa Wa-awhainaaa ilaihim fi'lal khairaati Wa-iqaamas Salaati Wa-eetaaa'az Zakaati Wa-kaanoo lanaa 'aabideen

text: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient.
tl: Wa-Lootan aatainaahu hukmanw Wa-'ilmanw Wa-najjainaahu minal qaryatil latee kaanat ta'malul khabaaa'is; innahum kaanoo qawma saw'in faasiqeen

text: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.
tl: Wa-adkhalnaahu fee rahmatinaa innahoo minas saaliheen

text: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allāh] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great affliction [i.e., the flood].
tl: Wa-noohan iz naadaa min qablu fastajabnaa lahoo fanajjainaahu Wa-ahlahoo minal karbil 'azeem

text: And We aided [i.e., saved] him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together.
tl: Wa-nasarnaahu minal qawmil lazeena kazzaboo bi-Aayaatinaa; innahum kaanoo qawma saw'in fa-aghraq-naahum ajma'een

text: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement.
tl: Wa-Daawooda Wa-Sulaimaana iz yahkumaani fil harsi iz nafashat feehi ghanamul qawmi Wa-kunnaa lihukmihim shaahideen

text: And We gave understanding of it [i.e., the case] to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that].
tl: Fafahhamnaahaa sulaimaan; Wa-kullan aatainaa hukmanw wa'ilmanw Wa-sakh-kharnaa ma'a Daawoodal jibaala yusabbihna wattayr; Wa-kunnaa faa'ileen

text: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful?
tl: Wa-'allamanaahu san'ata laboosil lakum lituhsinakum min ba'sikum fahal antum shaakiroon

text: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.
tl: Wa-li-Sulaimaanar reeha 'aasifatan tajree bi-amriheee ilal ardil latee baaraknaa feehaa; Wa-kunnaa bikulli shai'in 'aalimeen

text: And of the devils [i.e., jinn] were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.
tl: Wa-minash Shayaateeni maien yaghoosoona lahoo Wa-ya'maloona 'amalan doona zaalika Wa-kunna lahum haafizeen

text: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, \"Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful.\"
tl: Wa-Ayyooba iz naadaa Rabbahooo annee massaniyad durru Wa-Anta arhamur raahimeen

text: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allāh].
tl: Fastajabnaa lahoo fakashaf-naa maa bihee min durrinw Wa-aatainaahu ahlahoo Wa-mislahum ma'ahum rahmatan min 'indinaa Wa-zikraa lil'aabideen

text: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.
tl: Wa-Ismaa'eela Wa-Idreesa Wa-Zal Kifli kullum minas saabireen

text: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.
tl: Wa-adkhalnaahum fee rahmatinaa innahum minas saaliheen

text: And [mention] the man of the fish [i.e., Jonah], when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, \"There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.\"
tl: Wa-Zan Nooni iz zahaba mughaadiban fa-zannaa al lan naqdira 'alaihi fanaadaa fiz zulumaati al laaa ilaaha illaaa Anta Subhaanaka innee kuntu minaz zaalimeen

text: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers.
tl: Fastajabnaa lahoo Wa-najjainaahu minal ghamm; Wa-kazaalika nunjil mu'mineen

text: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, \"My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors.\"
tl: Wa-Zakariyyaaa iz naadaa Rabbahoo Rabbi laa tazarnee fardanw Wa-Anta khairul waariseen

text: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.
tl: Fastajabnaa lahoo Wa-wahabnaa lahoo Yahyaa Wa-aslahnaa lahoo zawjah; innahum kaanoo yusaari'oona fil khairaati Wa-yad'oonanaa raghabanw Wa-rahabaa; Wa-kaanoo lanaa khaashi'een

text: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.
tl: Wallateee ahsanat farjahaa fanafakhnaa feehaa min roohinaa Wa-ja'alnaahaa wabnahaaa Aayatan lil'aalameen

text: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.
tl: Inna haaziheee ummatukum ummatanw waahidatanw Wa-Ana Rabbukum fa'budoon

text: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.
tl: Wa-taqatta'ooo amrahum bainahum kullun ilainaaa raaji'oon

text: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.
tl: Famaien ya'mal minas saalihaati Wa-huwa mu'minun falaa kufraana lisa'yihee Wa-innaa lahoo kaatiboon

text: And it is prohibited to [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return
tl: Wa-haraamun 'alaa qaryatin ahlaknaahaaa annahum laa yarji'oon

text: Until when [the dam of] Gog and Magog has been opened and they, from every elevation, descend
tl: Hattaaa izaa futihat Ya'jooju Wa-Ma'jooju Wa-hum min kulli hadabien yansiloon

text: And [when] the true promise [i.e., the resurrection] has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], \"O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers.\"
tl: Waqtarabal wa'dul haqqu fa-izaa hiya shaakhisatun absaarul lazeena kafaroo yaawailanaa qad kunna fee ghaflatin min haaza bal kunnaa zaalimeen

text: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allāh are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it.
tl: Innakum Wa-maa ta'budoona min doonil laahi hasabu Jahannama antum lahaa waaridoon

text: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein.
tl: Law kaana haaa'ulaaa'i aalihatan maa waradoohaa Wa-kullun feehaa khaalidoon

text: For them therein is heavy sighing, and they therein will not hear.
tl: Lahum feehaa zafeerunw Wa-hum feehaa laa yasma'oon

text: Indeed, those for whom the best [reward] has preceded from Us - they are from it far removed.
tl: Innal lazeena sabaqat lahum minnal husnaaa ulaaa'ika 'anhaa mub'adoon

text: They will not hear its sound, while they are, in that which their souls desire, abiding eternally.
tl: Laa yasma'oona hasee-sahaa Wa-hum fee mash tahat anfusuhum khaalidoon

text: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], \"This is your Day which you have been promised\" -
tl: Laa yahzunuhumul faza'ul akbaru Wa-tatalaq-qaahumul malaaa'ikatu haazaa Yawmukumul lazee kuntum too'adoon

text: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.
tl: Yawma natwis samaaa'a kataiyis sijilli lilkutub; kamaa bada'naa awwala khalqin nu'eeduh; wa'dan 'alainaa; innaa kunna faa'ileen

text: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.
tl: Wa-laqad katabnaa fiz Zaboori min ba'diz zikri annal arda yarisuhaa 'ibaadi-yas saalihoon

text: Indeed, in this [Qur’ān] is notification for a worshipping people.
tl: Inna fee haaza labalaa-ghal liqawmin 'aabideen

text: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.
tl: Wa-maaa arsalnaaka illaa rahmatal lil'aalameen

text: Say, \"It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?\"
tl: Qul innamaa yoohaa ilaiya annamaaa ilaahukum illaahunw Waahid, fahal antum muslimoon

text: But if they turn away, then say, \"I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.
tl: Fa-in tawallaw faqul aazantukum 'alaa sawaaa'; Wa-in adreee aqareebun am ba'eedun maa too'adoon

text: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.
tl: Innahoo ya'lamul jahra minal qawli Wa-ya'lamu maa taktumoon

text: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time.\"
tl: Wa-in adree la'allahoo fitnatul lakum Wa-mataa'un ilaa heen

text: [The Prophet (ﷺ)] has said, \"My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbih kum bil-haqq; Wa-Rabbunar Rahmaa-nul musta'aanu 'alaa maa tasifoon
